ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the seismic wave */,
  "wavetype" TEXT /* Type of the seismic wave (e.g., Love, Rayleigh) */,
  "slowness" REAL /* Slowness of the seismic wave */,
  "azimuth" REAL /* Azimuth of the seismic wave */,
  "ellipticity" REAL /* Ellipticity of the seismic wave */,
  "noise" INTEGER /* Noise level associated with the data */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the seismic wave */,
  "valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is valid (1 for valid, 0 for invalid) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the seismic event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for data collection */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the seismic event */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_data_wavetype FOREIGN KEY ("wavetype") REFERENCES wave_types ("wavetype_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data source */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data source */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wave_types" (
  "wavetype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave type */,
  "wavetype_name" TEXT /* Name of the wave type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wave type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wavetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator who performed the validation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the validator */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the validator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the validator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the validator (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the validator is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "noise_level" INTEGER /* Noise level of the data */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the data */,
  "data_integrity" TEXT /* Integrity of the data (e.g., complete, incomplete, missing data) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry being processed */,
  "processing_type" TEXT /* Type of processing performed (e.g., filtering, normalization) */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the processing was performed */,
  "processing_details" TEXT /* Details of the processing */,
  "processing_result" TEXT /* Result of the processing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open, proprietary) */,
  "license_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the license */,
  "license_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_licenses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., journal, conference, report) */,
  "citation_details" TEXT /* Details of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_citations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "related_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related seismic data entry */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, related) */,
  "relationship_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relationships_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_relationships_related_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data entry */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, file import) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
